_logbook_note: Skipped by the /unit-of-work stakes rule: single-ticket unit; decisions of record live in the ZMVP-151 snapshot (§8 rulings 2026-07-21) and on epic ZMVP-149.
unit_note: Single-ticket unit: ZMVP-151 (The Other Side, second child). Reassignment at unit start (Engineer 2026-07-21): ZMVP-151 is CLAUDE's — 'Login is yours; I am doing UI in future tickets' (supersedes the 45163 note routing 151 to the Engineer). Rulings at unit start: convert GET /me to JSON (200 profile / 401 problem); POST /signin failures = problem+json; callback failures = 303 /login?error=<code>; Fable builds all but security-nature pieces — Opus builds the backend session-surface slice and runs /security-review. Previous unit 45163 (ZMVP-150) closed merged at 92833d6.

tickets.summary: A visitor signs in from the browser and signs out
tickets.next_action: slice 1 (backend session surface, Opus) -> slice 2 (api client + /login) -> slice 3 (guard + /logout + landing)
